news_title: Urgently Announces Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results
summary: Urgently (NASDAQ: ULY), a digital roadside assistance technology provider, reported itsQ2 2025 financial results. The company achievedrevenue of $31.7 million(down 8% YoY) with agross margin of 25%(up from 21% YoY). Notable improvements include a74% reduction in GAAP operating lossto $2.2 million and a97% reduction in non-GAAP operating lossto $0.2 million.The company completed191,000 dispatchesin Q2 and maintained a strongconsumer satisfaction score of 4.7/5. Urgently also launchedSPARK, its new AI-powered market analyzer for optimizing service provider performance. Year-to-date, the company reported revenue of$63.0 millionwith continued operational efficiency improvements.
